name: 3P Golf Sims
about: 3P Golf Sims is an indoor golf simulator facility offering a comprehensive golf experience year-round. They utilize state-of-the-art Trackman technology for accurate shot tracking and lifelike gameplay on virtual world-class courses. The venue provides a welcoming community atmosphere with flexible booking options for solo sessions, group play, leagues, and tournaments, along with event hosting capabilities for various occasions.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman technology for realistic gameplay
Community-focused atmosphere for players of all levels
Flexible booking options including hourly and memberships

food_and_drink.notes: Catering or snack options available for group and corporate events
BYOB policy not specified, likely allowed but not provided on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading radar technology for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly mention club rentals, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: While the venue offers catering services for events, their policy on outside food and drink is not clearly specified for individual sessions.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes is not specified, but hourly bookings are available starting at $48 per hour, allowing for flexible session lengths.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, 3P Golf Sims is kid-friendly and offers birthday party packages and events suitable for families and younger players.
